data.name: ErrorOccurred
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: AccessDeniedDescription
data.value: You do not have permission to access this page in the current company context.

data.name: ChooseHowToContinue
data.value: Choose how you want to continue

data.name: SetupAccessPrompt
data.value: Set up your access to enter the platform.

data.name: JoinExistingManagement
data.value: Join an existing management company account.

data.name: ResidentRequestAccess
data.value: Request access to your resident dashboard.

data.name: CreateCompanyDescription
data.value: This creates a company profile and links your user as the initial management member.

data.name: DashboardInProgress
data.value: This area layout is in place. Dashboard content is currently in progress.

data.name: UsersPageIntro
data.value: Manage members who belong to {0}, update company-level access, and prepare for future pending access requests.

data.name: AddCompanyUserDescription
data.value: Add an existing application user by email. This only creates company membership access and does not create a global account.

data.name: PendingAccessRequestsDescription
data.value: Review and decide pending employee onboarding access requests for this company.

data.name: NoPendingRequestsDescription
data.value: There are currently no pending access requests for this company.

data.name: CurrentUsersDescription
data.value: Only users in the current company scope are shown here.

data.name: NoCompanyUsersFoundDescription
data.value: Add the first company member by email to grant access.

data.name: TransferOwnershipDescription
data.value: Transfer company ownership for {0} to another active effective company member.

data.name: TransferOwnershipHelpText
data.value: The selected member will become the new owner. The current owner will be changed to manager automatically.

data.name: TransferOwnershipConfirm
data.value: Transfer company ownership to the selected member?

data.name: OwnerRoleManagedThroughTransfer
data.value: The owner role cannot be assigned, edited, or removed in generic user flows. Use the dedicated ownership transfer workflow instead.

data.name: OwnershipTransferRequiresCurrentOwner
data.value: Only the current owner can transfer ownership.

data.name: AddCustomerDescription
data.value: Add a customer in the current company scope.

data.name: CurrentCustomersDescription
data.value: Only customers in the current company scope are shown here.

data.name: NoCustomersFoundDescription
data.value: Add your first customer to start managing customer portfolio.

data.name: CustomerRegistryCodeAlreadyExists
data.value: Customer with this registry code already exists in this company.

data.name: AddResidentDescription
data.value: Add a resident in the current company scope.

data.name: CurrentResidentsDescription
data.value: Only residents in the current company scope are shown here.

data.name: NoResidentsFoundDescription
data.value: Add your first resident to start resident workspace access.

data.name: ResidentIdCodeAlreadyExists
data.value: Resident with this ID code already exists in this company.

data.name: ResidentSectionPlaceholder
data.value: {0} content is planned and will be added in a later increment.

data.name: CustomerSectionPlaceholder
data.value: {0} content is planned and will be added in a later increment.

data.name: PropertySectionPlaceholder
data.value: {0} content is planned and will be added in a later increment.

data.name: UnitDashboardIntro
data.value: Unit workspace for {0} in property {1}, customer {2} ({3}).

data.name: UnitSectionPlaceholder
data.value: {0} content is planned and will be added in a later increment.

data.name: ResidentLeaseAddDescription
data.value: Search a property, select a unit, and link it to this resident.

data.name: ResidentLeaseListDescription
data.value: Existing resident unit leases in the current company scope.

data.name: NoPropertiesFoundDescription
data.value: Try a different property search term within the current resident company scope.

data.name: NoResidentLeasesFoundDescription
data.value: No units are currently linked to this resident.

data.name: UnitLeaseAddDescription
data.value: Search a resident, select one result, and link the resident to this unit.

data.name: UnitLeaseListDescription
data.value: Existing resident leases linked to this unit in the current company scope.

data.name: NoUnitLeasesFoundDescription
data.value: No residents are currently linked to this unit.

data.name: UnableToDeleteBecauseDependentRecordsExist
data.value: Unable to delete because dependent records exist.

data.name: InvalidEndDate
data.value: End date must be on or after the start date.

data.name: DuplicateActiveLeaseForResident
data.value: An active lease for this unit already exists for the resident.

data.name: DuplicateActiveLeaseForUnit
data.value: An active lease for this resident already exists for the unit.

data.name: FlowInfoCreateAccountOrLogin
data.value: Create your account or log in to continue.

data.name: JoinRequestSubmitted
data.value: Join request submitted. Please wait for management company approval.

data.name: AccessRequestApproved
data.value: Access request approved and membership created.

data.name: RemoveUserFromCompanyConfirm
data.value: Remove this user from the company?

data.name: ResidentOnboardingDescription
data.value: This flow is not part of the current slice and is intentionally left as a placeholder.

data.name: StringLengthBetween
data.value: The field {0} must be a string with a minimum length of {2} and a maximum length of {1}.

data.name: InvalidEmailAddress
data.value: The {0} field is not a valid e-mail address.

data.name: PendingRequestForThisCompanyAlreadyExists
data.value: A pending request for this company already exists.

data.name: AlreadyMemberOfThisManagementCompany
data.value: You are already a member of this management company.

data.name: NoPermissionToResolveAccessRequests
data.value: You do not have permission to resolve access requests.

data.name: RequesterAlreadyMemberOfThisCompany
data.value: Requester is already a member of this company.

data.name: ManagementCompanyProfileDescription
data.value: Review and update the current management company profile details.

data.name: CustomerProfileDescription
data.value: Review and update the current customer profile details.

data.name: PropertyProfileDescription
data.value: Review and update the current property profile details.

data.name: UnitProfileDescription
data.value: Review and update the current unit profile details.

data.name: ResidentProfileDescription
data.value: Review and update the current resident profile details.

data.name: ProfileDeleteWarning
data.value: Deleting this profile is permanent and cannot be undone.

data.name: TicketsPageIntro
data.value: Track and manage maintenance tickets for {0}.

data.name: CurrentTicketsDescription
data.value: Only tickets in the current company scope are shown.

data.name: NoTicketsFoundDescription
data.value: Create a ticket or adjust filters.

data.name: DeleteTicketDescription
data.value: Deleting a ticket also removes its scheduled work and work logs.

data.name: TicketNumberAlreadyExists
data.value: Ticket number already exists in this company.

data.name: TicketScheduledRequiresVendor
data.value: Scheduled or later tickets require a vendor.

data.name: TicketScheduledRequiresDueDate
data.value: Scheduled or later tickets require a due date.

data.name: InvalidTicketProperty
data.value: Selected property is invalid for this customer.

data.name: InvalidTicketUnit
data.value: Selected unit is invalid for this property.

data.name: InvalidTicketResident
data.value: Selected resident is invalid for this unit.

data.name: TicketCustomerRequiredForProperty
data.value: Select a customer before selecting a property.

data.name: TicketPropertyRequiredForUnit
data.value: Select a property before selecting a unit.

data.name: TicketNumberMaxLength
data.value: Ticket number must be 20 characters or fewer.

data.name: TicketCreatedStatusMissing
data.value: Created ticket status is not configured.

data.name: TicketNextStatusMissing
data.value: Next ticket status is not configured.

data.name: TicketAlreadyAtFinalStatus
data.value: Ticket is already at the final status.

data.name: ContactAlreadyExists
data.value: A contact with the same type and value already exists in this company.

data.name: ContactValueMaxLength
data.value: Contact value must be 255 characters or fewer.

data.name: ContactNotesMaxLength
data.value: Notes must be 4000 characters or fewer.

data.name: AddVendorDescription
data.value: Create a maintenance provider for ticket assignment and scheduled work.

data.name: EditVendorDescription
data.value: Update provider details without changing existing ticket ownership.

data.name: DeleteVendorDescription
data.value: Confirm deletion of {0}. Vendors with tickets, scheduled work, contacts, or category assignments cannot be deleted.

data.name: NoVendorsFoundDescription
data.value: Create the first vendor before assigning providers to tickets or scheduled work.

data.name: NoScheduledWork
data.value: No scheduled work has been added yet.

data.name: ScheduledWorkTicketSummary
data.value: Vendor work scheduled for this ticket.

data.name: DeleteScheduledWorkDescription
data.value: Delete scheduled work only when no work logs exist.

data.name: DeleteScheduledWorkConfirmation
data.value: Delete scheduled work for {0}? This is blocked when work logs exist.

data.name: ScheduledWorkStatusMissing
data.value: Scheduled work status is not configured.

data.name: WorkInProgressStatusMissing
data.value: In-progress work status is not configured.

data.name: WorkCompletedStatusMissing
data.value: Completed work status is not configured.

data.name: WorkCancelledStatusMissing
data.value: Cancelled work status is not configured.

data.name: ScheduledWorkMustStartBeforeComplete
data.value: Scheduled work must be started before it can be completed.

data.name: RealEndCannotBeBeforeRealStart
data.value: Actual end cannot be before actual start.

data.name: ScheduledWorkDeleteBlockedByLogs
data.value: Scheduled work cannot be deleted while work logs exist.

data.name: TicketAssignedRequiresVendor
data.value: Assign a vendor before moving the ticket to assigned.

data.name: ScheduledEndCannotBeBeforeScheduledStart
data.value: Scheduled end cannot be before scheduled start.

data.name: ScheduledWorkNotesMaxLength
data.value: Notes must be 4000 characters or fewer.

data.name: TicketScheduledRequiresScheduledWork
data.value: Schedule vendor work before moving the ticket to scheduled.

data.name: TicketInProgressRequiresStartedWork
data.value: Start scheduled work before moving the ticket to in progress.

data.name: TicketCompletedRequiresCompletedWork
data.value: Complete scheduled work before moving the ticket to completed.

data.name: TicketMustBeAssignedBeforeSchedulingWork
data.value: Assign the ticket before scheduling work.

data.name: TicketMustBeScheduledBeforeStartingWork
data.value: Move the ticket to scheduled before starting work.

data.name: TicketMustBeInProgressBeforeCompletingWork
data.value: Move the ticket to in progress before completing work.

data.name: VendorNestedWorkflowsComingLater
data.value: Contacts and category assignments are handled in upcoming workflow pages.

data.name: VendorRegistryCodeAlreadyExists
data.value: Vendor with this registry code already exists in this company.

data.name: VendorDeleteConfirmationMismatch
data.value: Delete confirmation does not match the current vendor registry code.

data.name: VendorDeleteBlockedByDependencies
data.value: Unable to delete vendor because tickets, scheduled work, contacts, or category assignments exist.

data.name: VendorContactsComingLater
data.value: Contacts are handled in an upcoming workflow page.

data.name: VendorCategoryAlreadyAssigned
data.value: This category is already assigned to the vendor.

data.name: VendorCategoryAssignmentWasNotFound
data.value: Vendor category assignment was not found.

data.name: RemoveVendorContactConfirmation
data.value: Remove this contact from the vendor? The shared contact record remains available for the company.

data.name: VendorContactAlreadyLinked
data.value: This contact is already linked to the vendor.

data.name: RemoveResidentContactConfirmation
data.value: Remove this contact from the resident? The shared contact record remains available for the company.

data.name: ResidentContactAlreadyLinked
data.value: This contact is already linked to the resident.

data.name: ValidToCannotBeBeforeValidFrom
data.value: Valid to cannot be before valid from.

data.name: TicketVendorDoesNotSupportCategory
data.value: Selected vendor is not assigned to this ticket category.

data.name: NoWorkLogs
data.value: No work logs have been added yet.

data.name: WorkLogClosedTicketBlocked
data.value: Work logs cannot be changed after the ticket is closed.

data.name: TicketCompletedRequiresWorkLog
data.value: Add at least one work log before moving the ticket to completed.

data.name: WorkLogRequiresMeaningfulField
data.value: Enter at least one work log value.

data.name: WorkLogEndCannotBeBeforeStart
data.value: Work end cannot be before work start.

data.name: WorkLogHoursNonNegative
data.value: Hours must be zero or greater.

data.name: WorkLogMaterialCostNonNegative
data.value: Material cost must be zero or greater.

data.name: WorkLogLaborCostNonNegative
data.value: Labor cost must be zero or greater.

data.name: WorkLogDescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description must be 4000 characters or fewer.
